info.title: Monev SE26 API
info.description: API documentation for Monev SE26 application

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, returns Bearer token
Revoke the current access token. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get the currently authenticated user. Requires Bearer token.

get.summary: List or get Histogram Kecamatan For Kabupaten/Kota
get.description: List paginated records, or get single by kode_bps. Requires Bearer token. Access scoped by user kode_kab.

data.description: Single object or array of items

get.summary: List or get Histogram Desa For Kabupaten/Kota
get.description: List paginated records, or get single by kode_bps. Requires Bearer token. Access scoped by user kode_kab.

data.description: Single object or array of items

get.description: List paginated records (optional filters: kode_kab = kode_bps chars 3-4, kode_kec = chars 5-7), or get single by kode_bps. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Create a new master desa record. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Returns a single master desa record. Requires Bearer token.

put.description: Update a master desa record by ID. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a master desa record by ID. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: List paginated records, or get single by kode_bps. Requires Bearer token. Access scoped by user kode_kab.

data.description: Single object or array of items

post.description: Create a new master kabupaten/kota record. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Returns a single master kabupaten/kota record. Requires Bearer token.

put.description: Update a master kabupaten/kota record by ID. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a master kabupaten/kota record by ID. Requires Bearer token.

patch.description: Same as PUT. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: List paginated records (optional filter by kode_kab = chars 3-4 of kode_bps), or get single by kode_bps. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Create a new master kecamatan record. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Returns a single master kecamatan record. Requires Bearer token.

put.description: Update a master kecamatan record by ID. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a master kecamatan record by ID. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Paginated list of subsls. Filter by kode_kab, kode_kec, kode_desa.

delete.description: Delete a subsls record by ID

patch.description: Update only se26_selesai, se26_diperiksa, and se2026_is_finish (0/1). Other fields are ignored.
